candidate.selection_reason: Adds a second public frozen model while preserving the same box-prompt protocol used for SAM ViT-B in S1/S3.
candidate.training_status_for_this_quest: frozen_off_the_shelf_only; no AngioStress training or fine-tuning

source_evidence.readme_checkpoint_instruction: README instructs users to download the model checkpoint from a Google Drive folder and place medsam_vit_b.pth under work_dir/MedSAM/medsam_vit_b.
source_evidence.source_checksum_status: No upstream checksum was found in the README during this audit; local SHA256 values are recorded below.

local_artifacts.cpu_mapping_reason: The official checkpoint was serialized from CUDA and failed to load on the local non-CUDA host through segment_anything.sam_model_registry; torch.load(..., map_location='cpu') followed by torch.save produced a loadable CPU-mapped copy without changing model weights for inference.

decision.comparability_boundary: Compare SAM ViT-B and MedSAM ViT-B under the same DIAS s40 frames, same sequence-level label-derived box prompt, same metrics, and same analog subset definitions.
decision.claim_boundary: This audit supports a second frozen-model panel smoke only. It does not support construct validity, clinical accuracy, or synthetic-to-real rank correlation by itself.
